post.subject: Goodbye Dear Nilfisk
post.body: I just did the hoovering for the final time before i move out!! I will miss this thing... .... not

comments.subject: my dear hoover...
comments.body:
my dyson i shall truely miss
remind me to give it a kiss
its irritation was not its fault
phil lets go out for a malt .... with people from the internet.
never realised id have to say bye to my hoover...
comments.author: kayteeforstar

comments.body: Yes we should - when do you move? Yeah you've told me before but i forget...
comments.author: obsolete_mind
